scene: A doodle Cleopatra with an Egyptian headdress standing on a timeline between a pyramid on one side and a rocket on the other, big black caps CLOSER TO THE MOON LANDING? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

A timeline arrow showing the pyramid far far left, Cleopatra near the right, a moon rocket just past her, big black caps THE MATH IS REAL. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
Doodle Cleopatra looking back at a dusty ancient pyramid with cobwebs, big black caps ALREADY 2,000 YEARS OLD. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
The pyramid under a starry sky, immense and old, big black caps OLDER THAN YOU THINK. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
